tools.name: get_vacation_rental_details
tools.description: Get complete details for a vacation rental property including name, location, address, property type, bedrooms, bathrooms, nightly rate, amenities, house rules, photos, protection status, and host reputation score. Use the property_id (UUID) or lilo_code (e.g. PROP-2343) to identify the property.

tools.name: search_vacation_rentals_by_location
tools.description: Search for vacation rentals, short-term rentals, and accommodation properties by location, guest count, and property type. Use this when a traveler wants to find a place to stay. Returns matching properties with names, locations, nightly rates, photos, and protection status.

tools.name: search_vacation_rental_market
tools.description: Search lilo's market discovery for vacation rental properties in any US location. Filter by price range, bedrooms, superhost status, and World Cup 2026 host cities. Returns property listings including non-activated properties for market research.

tools.name: search_vacation_rentals_by_description
tools.description: Search for vacation rentals using a natural language description. Examples: 'romantic beachfront getaway with hot tub', 'family-friendly house with pool near Disney', 'quiet cabin in the mountains for a writers retreat'. Finds matching properties by semantic meaning, not just keywords. Pass the desc

tools.name: find_similar_vacation_rentals
tools.description: Find vacation rentals similar to a given property. Useful for recommending alternatives when a property is unavailable or when the traveler wants to compare similar options. Pass a property_id (UUID or lilo_code) and optional limit (default 5).

tools.name: get_vacation_rental_reputation_score
tools.description: Get the reputation score and performance data for a specific vacation rental property. Returns dispute win rate, protection statistics, host response times, overall reputation score, and a narrative summary. Use this to evaluate a property's track record before recommending it.

tools.name: get_vacation_rental_identity_manifest
tools.description: Get the machine-readable property identity manifest with structured evidence data, visibility metadata, and verification references. Use this for programmatic property data consumption.

tools.name: get_vacation_rental_ai_manifest
tools.description: Get the AI-optimized property manifest in schema.org format with lilo extensions. Available in YAML, JSON, or JSON-LD format. Use this for structured data integration and AI agent consumption.

tools.name: get_vacation_rental_host_reputation
tools.description: Get the reputation score and verified evidence summary for a vacation rental host. Returns protection stats, evidence count, dispute resolution rate, and verification status. Use this to verify a host's trustworthiness.

tools.name: verify_vacation_rental_evidence_record
tools.description: Verify the authenticity and integrity of a specific evidence record. Confirms the evidence has not been tampered with, existed at the claimed timestamp, and is independently verifiable. Pass the evidence_id (UUID).

tools.name: check_vacation_rental_protection_status
tools.description: Check whether a vacation rental property is actively protected by lilo. Returns protection status (active/inactive/expired), protection tier, active features, and last activity timestamp.

tools.name: get_vacation_rental_house_rules
tools.description: Get the house rules for a vacation rental in structured, machine-readable format. Returns maximum guests, quiet hours, pet policy, smoking policy, check-in/check-out times, parking, and special restrictions.

tools.name: get_vacation_rental_faqs
tools.description: Get all frequently asked questions and answers for a vacation rental property. Covers WiFi password, check-in instructions, parking, appliances, emergency contacts, and local info. Filter by category: check_in, check_out, wifi_internet, parking, appliances, emergency, local_info.

tools.name: get_local_recommendations_near_rental
tools.description: Get local recommendations near a vacation rental property. Returns nearby restaurants, coffee shops, grocery stores, activities, and attractions. Filter by type: restaurants, coffee, grocery, activities, attractions.

tools.name: ask_vacation_rental_question
tools.description: Ask a natural language question about a vacation rental property and get an answer grounded in verified data. Examples: 'What is the WiFi password?', 'Where do I park?', 'Is there a dishwasher?', 'What time is check-out?'. Requires property_id and the question text.

tools.name: get_lilo_protection_network_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate statistics about the lilo vacation rental b205441e535a1c551e9e50d31468cb9

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_vacation_rental_faqs" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get all frequently asked questions and answers for a vacation rental property. Covers WiFi password, check-in instructions, parking, appliances, emergency conta…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "ask_vacation_rental_question" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Ask a natural language question about a vacation rental property and get an answer grounded in verified data. Examples: 'What is the WiFi password?', 'Where do …

labels.name: get_chargeback_defense_for_booking
labels.description: Generate a chargeback defense packet for a payment dispute on a vacation rental booking. Includes verified evidence of guest consent, check-in documentation, and interaction history. Pass booking_id (UUID), optional dispute_id, and disputed amount in cents.

labels.name: record_guest_interaction_to_evidence
labels.description: Record a guest interaction to the vacation rental's evidence chain. Creates a verified evidence record of the interaction. Pass property_id, interaction_type (inquiry, complaint, request, confirmation), content text, and channel (mcp, voice, sms, email). Optional: booking_id.

labels.name: get_evidence_timeline_for_rental
labels.description: Get a chronological timeline of all evidence records for a vacation rental property or specific booking. Filter by date range. Returns events in order with timestamps, types, and verification status.

labels.name: analyze_booking_threat_risk
labels.description: Analyze a vacation rental booking or guest interaction for potential threats and risks. Returns risk assessment level, identified concerns, and recommended actions for the host. Pass booking_id, message_content, and/or guest_profile for analysis.

labels.name: screen_guest_before_booking
labels.description: Pre-booking guest risk assessment for vacation rental hosts. Evaluates guest profile, booking details, and communication patterns to provide a risk level (low/medium/high/critical) with specific recommendations. Helps hosts decide whether to accept a booking request. Pass guest_email, guest_phone, g

labels.name: detect_guest_message_threat_pattern
labels.description: Analyze a guest message or conversation for concerning patterns that may indicate risks to the vacation rental host. Pass the message text and optional conversation_history for context. Returns threat assessment and recommended response.

labels.name: detect_guest_communication_risk
labels.description: Analyze guest messages for risk patterns in vacation rental communications. Returns risk assessment, evidence documentation, and response guidance for hosts. More comprehensive than detect_guest_message_threat_pattern — includes documentation and guest/property cross-referencing.

labels.name: assess_extended_stay_squatter_risk
labels.description: Assess the risk of a guest establishing tenancy rights during an extended vacation rental stay. Evaluates stay duration against jurisdiction-specific tenant protection laws. Returns risk level, relevant state laws, and preventive recommendations. Pass check_in_date, check_out_date, and state code.

labels.name: flag_booking_for_enhanced_monitoring
labels.description: Flag a vacation rental booking for enhanced monitoring by lilo's protection system. Creates an alert with the specified reason and risk indicators. Use this when a host identifies concerning behavior. Requires booking_id and reason. Optional: array of risk_indicators.

labels.name: predict_booking_chargeback_probability
labels.description: Predict the probability of a chargeback (payment dispute) for a vacation rental booking. Returns risk score, key risk factors, and specific prevention recommendations. Pass booking_id (UUID), optional amount in cents, and optional guest_profile.

labels.name: get_vacation_rental_pricing_analysis
labels.description: Get competitive pricing analysis for a vacation rental market. Returns comparable property rates, market average, pricing optimization suggestions, and seasonal adjustments. Pass location (required), optional property_id for direct comparison, and optional bedrooms count.

labels.name: forecast_vacation_rental_demand
labels.description: Forecast booking demand for vacation rentals in a specific location over a date range. Returns seasonal trends, event-driven demand spikes (World Cup, holidays, concerts), occupancy predictions, and pricing recommendations. Pass location (required), date_range_start, and date_range_end.

labels.name: get_short_term_rental_regulations
labels.description: Get local short-term rental (STR) regulations for a specific city and state. Returns permit requirements, occupancy taxes, maximum guest limits, zoning restrictions, and operational requirements. Essential for hosts to understand compliance. Pass state code (required), optional city and property_typ

labels.name: check_str_permit_requirements
labels.description: Check what permits and licenses are required to operate a short-term rental at a specific location. Returns required permits, application processes, fees, and renewal schedules. Pass state code (required), optional city and property_id.

labels.name: generate_str_tax_documentation
labels.description: Generate tax documentation for short-term rental income. Includes occupancy tax calculations, income summaries, and reporting data for tax filing. Pass host_id (UUID) and year (required). Optional: quarter (1-4) for quarterly reports.

labels.name: check_world_cup_2026_str_compliance
labels.description: Check World Cup 2026 specific short-term rental compliance requirements for the 16 US host cities. Returns special regulations, surge pricing rules, enhanced permit requirements, and safety standards that apply during the tournament. Pass the city name (required), optional property_id.

labels.name: get_str_insurance_requirements
labels.description: Get insurance requirements and recommendations for short-term rental hosts by state. Returns liability minimums, STR-specific coverage options, and recommended policy limits based on property type and estimated revenue.

labels.name: get_vacation_rental_inventory
labels.description: Get the inventory list for a vacation rental property. Returns all tracked items with quantities, locations, condition, and recent check history. Filter by category: furniture, appliance, electronics, linen, kitchenware, bathroom, decor, outdoor, safety, amenity, supply.

labels.name: report_rental_inventory_issue
labels.description: Report a missing, damaged, or low-stock inventory item at a vacation rental property. Creates an issue record with optional photo evidence. Pass property_id, item_name, and issue_type (missing, damaged, low_stock, needs_replacement). Optional: description, booking_id, photo_url.

labels.name: get_rental_maintenance_schedule
labels.description: Get upcoming and overdue maintenance tasks for a vacation rental property. Includes HVAC filter changes, appliance servicing, pest control, and all recurring maintenance. Pass property_id, optional include_overdue (default true), and days_ahead (default 30).

labels.name: create_rental_maintenance_task
labels.description: Create a new maintenance task for a vacation rental property. Supports one-time and recurring tasks. Pass property_id, task_name, and task_type (hvac_filter, deep_clean, appliance_service, pest_control, exterior, safety_check, other). Optional: priority, description, recurring, frequency_days, due_d

labels.name: get_rental_cleaning_schedule
labels.description: Get the cleaning schedule and cleaner assignments for a vacation rental property. Shows upcoming turnovers between bookings, assigned cleaners, and scheduling gaps. Pass property_id and optional days_ahead (default 14).

labels.name: assign_cleaner_to_rental_turnover
labels.description: Assign a cleaner to a vacation rental property turnover between bookings. Supports primary and backup cleaner assignments. Pass property_id, cleaner_id, booking_id, optional role (primary/backup), and scheduled_date.

labels.name: verify_rental_checkout_condition
labels.description: Record checkout verification for a vacation rental with checklist completion and photo evidence. Used by cleaners or hosts to document property condition after a guest departure. Pass property_id, booking_id, overall_condition (excellent/good/fair/poor/damaged), optional checklist_items, issues_foun

labels.name: search_philadelphia_historic_properties
labels.description: Search Philadelphia historic properties and landmarks from public records. Useful for World Cup 2026 and America's 250th Anniversary (2026) planning. Filter by type: landmark, historic_religious, african_american, or all.

labels.name: get_philadelphia_landmark_details
labels.description: Get detailed information about a specific Philadelphia landmark including full property manifest and Schema.org structured data. Pass landmark_id (e.g., phl-landmark-123) and source type (landmark, religious, aahs).

labels.name: search_philadelphia_event_venues
labels.description: Search Philadelphia event and wedding venues. Returns venue details including capacity, type, availability, and booking information. Filter by venue_type (wedding, event, historic, all) and minimum capacity.

labels.name: get_philadelphia_world_cup_2026_info
labels.description: Get World Cup 2026 information for Philadelphia. FREE TOOL. Returns match schedule, venue details (Lincoln Financial Field), expected accommodation demand surge, transportation info, and STR compliance requirements. No parameters required.

labels.name: get_philadelphia_250th_anniversary_events
labels.description: Get America's 250th Anniversary (July 4, 2026) event information for Philadelphia. Returns key historic sites, planned celebrations, expected visitor numbers, and accommodation surge predictions for the semiquincentennial. No parameters required.

labels.name: ingest_philadelphia_public_records
labels.description: PREMIUM: Full Philadelphia data ingestion from public records. Ingests landmarks, historic religious properties, and African American historic sites into the lilo system. Pass source: all, landmarks, religious, or aahs.

labels.name: get_vacation_rental_trust_certificate
labels.description: Access the continuously maintained trust certificate for a lilo-protected vacation rental property. Includes verification data for independent validation of the property's protection status, evidence integrity, and host reputation. Pass lilo_code (e.g. PROP-6408).

labels.name: verify_vacation_rental_trust_chain
labels.description: Independently verify a specific evidence record in a vacation rental property's trust chain. Confirms the evidence has been independently verified and is tamper-proof. Pass lilo_code (e.g. PROP-6408) and envelope_hash of the evidence record to verify.

labels.name: analyze_guest_interaction_risk
labels.description: Analyze a guest interaction at a vacation rental for potential risks. Returns risk assessment and recommended actions. Alias for analyze_booking_threat_risk. Pass booking_id, message_content, and/or guest_profile.

labels.name: analyze_guest_communication_risk
labels.description: Analyze guest messages at a vacation rental for concerning patterns. Returns risk assessment, evidence documentation, and response guidance for hosts. Alias for detect_guest_communication_risk.

labels.name: get_dispute_defense_packet_for_booking
labels.description: Generate a dispute defense packet with independently verified evidence for a vacation rental payment dispute. Alias for get_chargeback_defense_for_booking.

labels.name: assess_vacation_rental_booking_risk
labels.description: Assess risk factors for a specific vacation rental booking with protection recommendations. Returns risk level, identified concerns, and suggested protective actions. Pass booking_id (UUID) and optional include_guest_risk (default true).

labels.name: get_vacation_rental_onboarding_status
labels.description: Check onboarding progress for a vacation rental property on lilo. Returns which setup steps are complete and which are still needed (property details, photos, house rules, calendar sync, payment setup, etc.). Pass lilo_code (e.g. PROP-6408) or property_id (UUID).

labels.name: search_vacation_rentals
labels.description: Search for vacation rental properties with structured filtering. Returns results optimized for AI deep research with id, title, url, snippet, pricing, and property attributes. Use this for broad property discovery. Supports filtering by city, state, bedrooms, price, and pet-friendliness.

labels.name: fetch_vacation_rental_details
labels.description: Fetch complete details for a specific vacation rental property by its lilo code (e.g. PROP-2343). Returns full property data including title, description as markdown text, photos, reviews, amenities, trust score, and booking URL. Optimized for AI deep research consumption.

labels.name: search_world_cup_rentals
labels.description: Search for vacation rentals in FIFA World Cup 2026 host cities. Returns properties with stadium proximity information, match schedules, and expected demand surge data. Use this when a traveler is looking for accommodation for World Cup 2026 matches. Supports 11 US host cities: Miami, New York, Los A

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: generate_google_vacation_rentals_feed, get_dispute_evidence_bundle_for_booking, search_vacation_rentals, fetch_vacation_rental_details · Private data: get_vacation_rental_reputation_score, verify_vacation_rental_evidence_record, get_vacation_rental_faqs, ask_vacation_rental_question, verify_guest_identity_for_check_in, book_vacation_rental_direct, query_vacation_rental_evidence_chain, verify_evidence_anchor_integrity, get_dispute_evidence_bundle_for_booking, record_guest_interaction_to_evidence, get_evidence_timeline_for_rental, report_rental_inventory_issue, verify_rental_checkout_condition, search_philadelphia_historic_properties, ingest_philadelphia_public_records, verify_vacation_rental_trust_chain · Public sink: record_guest_interaction_to_evidence · Destructive: get_vacation_rental_ai_manifest, get_vacation_rental_house_rules, generate_google_vacation_rentals_feed.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: generate_google_vacation_rentals_feed, get_dispute_evidence_bundle_for_booking, search_vacation_rentals, fetch_vacation_rental_details · Private data: get_vacation_rental_reputation_score, verify_vacation_rental_evidence_record, get_vacation_rental_faqs, ask_vacation_rental_question, verify_guest_identity_for_check_in, book_vacation_rental_direct, query_vacation_rental_evidence_chain, verify_evidence_anchor_integrity, get_dispute_evidence_bundle_for_booking, record_guest_interaction_to_evidence, get_evidence_timeline_for_rental, report_rental_inventory_issue, verify_rental_checkout_condition, search_philadelphia_historic_properties, ingest_philadelphia_public_records, verify_vacation_rental_trust_chain · Public sink: record_guest_interaction_to_evidence · Destructive: get_vacation_rental_ai_manifest, get_vacation_rental_house_rules, generate_google_vacation_rentals_feed

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
